'''Independence Week''' was a [[holiday]] in the [[Freeworlds Territory]] within the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was celebrated from the 10th to the 15th of [[Relona]]. It celebrated the Freeworlds' separation from the [[Expanse]].<ref name="LE" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
